member.name: M:PgMini.DbClient.#ctor(Npgsql.NpgsqlDataSource,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{PgMini.DbClient})
member.summary: Initialises a client that shares an externally-owned . The data source is NOT disposed when this client is disposed — the caller manages its lifetime.

member.name: M:PgMini.DbClient.#ctor(System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{PgMini.DbClient})
member.summary: Initialises a client that builds and owns its own . Dynamic JSON and out-of-order metadata are enabled by default. The data source is disposed when this client is disposed.

member.name: M:PgMini.DbClient.DisposeAsync
member.summary: Disposes the underlying if this client owns it.

member.name: T:PgMini.Delegates.TxStep
member.summary: A step in a transactional pipeline. Receives the query and parameters forwarded from the previous step's post-action, plus the active transaction. Autonomous steps (built with AutonomousTx*Step) ignore the first two arguments.

member.name: T:PgMini.Delegates.PostAction
member.summary: Post-action run after a READ or SCALAR step. The is the raw return value of the step (a List<T> for reads, a scalar for scalars). Returns the query and parameters to forward to the next step, or (null, null) to pass nothing.

member.name: T:PgMini.Delegates.PostExecuteAction
member.summary: Post-action run after an EXECUTE step. The is the number of rows affected by the previous command. Returns the query and parameters to forward to the next step.

member.name: T:PgMini.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering PgMini with the .NET DI container.

member.name: M:PgMini.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddPgMini(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String,System.Action{Npgsql.NpgsqlDataSourceBuilder})
member.summary:
Registers a singleton and a scoped using the provided .
Optionally configure the data source builder (e.g. add type mappers, enable Geometry support). Dynamic JSON is enabled by default.

member.name: M:PgMini.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddNamedPgMini(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String,System.String,System.Action{Npgsql.NpgsqlDataSourceBuilder})
member.summary:
Registers a keyed singleton and a keyed scoped under the given . Useful for multi-tenant or multi-database scenarios.
Inject with [FromKeyedServices("name")] in .NET 8+.

member.name: T:PgMini.Helpers.TxHelper
member.summary: Static helpers for building post-actions in a transactional pipeline.

member.name: M:PgMini.Helpers.TxHelper.NoOp
member.summary: Returns a that passes nothing to the next step. Use this when the current step's result does not need to influence the next step's query.

member.name: M:PgMini.Helpers.TxHelper.NoOpExecute
member.summary: Returns a that passes nothing to the next step.

member.name: T:PgMini.Interfaces.IDbClient
member.summary: PostgreSQL database client. Provides typed query execution, scalar reads, batch operations, and a composable transactional pipeline.

member.name: M:PgMini.Interfaces.IDbClient.ReadAsync``1(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{PgMini.Models.QueryParams},Npgsql.NpgsqlTransaction,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes and maps all rows to .

member.name: M:PgMini.Interfaces.IDbClient.ReadFirstOrDefaultAsync``1(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{PgMini.Models.QueryParams},Npgsql.NpgsqlTransaction,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the first matching row, or null if the result set is empty.

member.name: M:PgMini.Interfaces.IDbClient.ReadSingleAsync``1(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{PgMini.Models.QueryParams},Npgsql.NpgsqlTransaction,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns exactly one row. Throws if the result set is empty or contains more than one row.

member.name: M:PgMini.Interfaces.IDbClient.ExistsAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{PgMini.Models.QueryParams},Npgsql.NpgsqlTransaction,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a SELECT EXISTS(...) query and returns the boolean result.

member.name: M:PgMini.Interfaces.IDbClient.ExecuteAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{PgMini.Models.QueryParams},Npgsql.NpgsqlTransaction,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a non-query command and returns the number of affected rows.

member.name: M:PgMini.Interfaces.IDbClient.ExecuteBatchAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{PgMini.Models.BatchCommand},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes multiple commands in a single round-trip using NpgsqlBatch. Returns the total number of affected rows.

member.name: M:PgMini.Interfaces.IDbClient.ExecuteScalarAsync``1(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{PgMini.Models.QueryParams},Npgsql.NpgsqlTransaction,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a scalar query and returns the single value, or null.

member.name: M:PgMini.Interfaces.IDbClient.RunTransactional``1(PgMini.Models.Transaction,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Runs all steps in inside a single PostgreSQL transaction. Commits on success; rolls back and rethrows on any exception. Returns the result of the last step, cast to .

member.name: M:PgMini.Interfaces.IDbClient.TxReadStep``1
member.summary: Creates a READ step that uses the query and params forwarded from the previous step.

member.name: M:PgMini.Interfaces.IDbClient.AutonomousTxReadStep``1(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{PgMini.Models.QueryParams})
member.summary: Creates a READ step with a fixed query and params, ignoring forwarded values.

member.name: M:PgMini.Interfaces.IDbClient.TxExecuteStep
member.summary: Creates an EXECUTE step that uses the query and params forwarded from the previous step.

member.name: M:PgMini.Interfaces.IDbClient.AutonomousTxExecuteStep(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{PgMini.Models.QueryParams})
member.summary: Creates an EXECUTE step with a fixed query and params, ignoring forwarded values.

member.name: M:PgMini.Interfaces.IDbClient.TxExecuteScalarStep``1
member.summary: Creates a SCALAR step that uses the query and params forwarded from the previous step.

member.name: M:PgMini.Interfaces.IDbClient.AutonomousTxExecuteScalarStep``1(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{PgMini.Models.QueryParams})
member.summary: Creates a SCALAR step with a fixed query and params, ignoring forwarded values.

member.name: T:PgMini.Models.BatchCommand
member.summary: A single command within a batch execution.

member.name: M:PgMini.Models.BatchCommand.#ctor(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{PgMini.Models.QueryParams})
member.summary: A single command within a batch execution.

member.name: T:PgMini.Models.QueryParams
member.summary: Represents a named parameter for a parameterized SQL query.

member.name: P:PgMini.Models.QueryParams.Key
member.summary: Parameter name (without the leading @).

member.name: P:PgMini.Models.QueryParams.Value
member.summary: Parameter value. Pass null to bind SQL NULL.

member.name: M:PgMini.Models.QueryParams.Of(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Convenience factory.

member.name: T:PgMini.Models.Transaction
member.summary: Describes a named group of steps that execute within a single PostgreSQL transaction. Steps run sequentially; any exception triggers a rollback.

member.name: P:PgMini.Models.Transaction.TransactionGroupName
member.summary: Human-readable name used in log output to identify this transaction group.

member.name: P:PgMini.Models.Transaction.Queries
member.summary: Ordered list of pipeline steps.

member.name: T:PgMini.Models.TransactionalQuery
member.summary:
A single step in a pipeline.
Step execution order:
is invoked with the query/params forwarded from the previous step.
Exactly one post-action may be set; it receives the step result and returns the forwarded query/params for the next step.
Set only one of , , or .

member.name: P:PgMini.Models.TransactionalQuery.Runnable
member.summary: The database operation to run. Build with IDbClient.Tx*Step() helpers.

member.name: P:PgMini.Models.TransactionalQuery.PostRead
member.summary: Post-action for READ steps. Receives List<T> cast as object.

member.name: P:PgMini.Models.TransactionalQuery.PostExecute
member.summary: Post-action for EXECUTE steps. Receives the affected row count.

member.name: P:PgMini.Models.TransactionalQuery.PostExecuteScalar
member.summary: Post-action for SCALAR steps. Receives the scalar result cast as object.
